# LLMs.txt for findwords.github.io

## About This Site
Find English Words is a website dedicated to helping users find and learn English words. The site is hosted at https://findwords.github.io/.

## Main Pages
- Homepage: https://findwords.github.io/index.html - The main entry point for finding English words.
- About Page: https://findwords.github.io/about.html - Information about the website and its purpose.
- Contact Page: https://findwords.github.io/contact.html - A page to get in touch with the site owner.
- Privacy Policy: https://findwords.github.io/privacy.html - The site's privacy policy.
- Terms of Service: https://findwords.github.io/terms.html - The terms and conditions for using the site.
- Cookies Policy: https://findwords.github.io/cookies.html - Information about the site's use of cookies.

## Key Resources
- **Robots.txt**: https://findwords.github.io/robots.txt - Instructions for web crawlers.
- **Stylesheet**: https://findwords.github.io/css/style.css - The main CSS file for styling.
- **JavaScript**: https://findwords.github.io/js/footer.js - A JavaScript file for footer functionality.

## Repository Information
- **Source Code**: The project is open-source and available on GitHub at https://github.com/findwords/findwords.github.io.
- **Primary Languages**: HTML (54.1%), JavaScript (24.3%), CSS (21.6%).
- **Latest Update**: The most recent commit was on July 19, 2026.
